intent: Fix issue #27: stop the shape gate from sending receipt authors into a REWORK loop on CI bookkeeping. CI-corroborated validation_plan steps (ci_covered, or mapping to a policy ci_evidence_checks entry) may be skipped without failing shape, and evidence is matched to steps by id or whitespace-normalized command so trivial diffs no longer read as missing evidence.

validation_plan.reason: TypeScript must compile after the type + logic changes to types.ts/shape.ts/scaffold.ts
Unit tests (shape + severity + schema-discoverability suites) must stay green, including the new issue-27 tests
The repo's CI 'test' job (build + tsc + npm test) is the authoritative run; corroborated by the ci-evidence gate, not runnable in this sandbox as a check-run

execution_evidence.skip_reason: cannot run the GitHub 'test' check-run in the sandbox; corroborated by the ci-evidence gate against the PR's real CI run

result_summary: Extended the receipt schema with optional validation_plan.id / ci_covered and execution_evidence.step (back-compat), taught the shape gate to treat CI-covered steps as satisfied by ci-evidence and to match evidence by id or normalized command with a precise mismatch message, updated plumb schema and AGENTS.md (repo + init template), and added tests. Verified with npm run build and npm test (108/108).
